name: Fables Among Us
overview: The conclusion to the Goldi and Zami Universe, taking place years after the events of "Land of Wonders" The fable community have brought themselves into the real world hiding amongst the humans. they lived in peace for years until the infamous Russian Boogieman 'Babay' started terrorising the queen of fables. Snow white. it's up to her and her friends to fight against The evils of The boogieman and his employer 'the Genie'
